subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.26
question_html:
Which statement explains the Lewis acid–base nature of the chloride ion in this reaction?

C2H5+ + Cl– → C2H5Cl

A.  Lewis base because it donates a pair of electrons

B.  Lewis base because it accepts a pair of electrons

C.  Lewis acid because it donates a pair of electrons

D.  Lewis acid because it accepts a pair of electrons
examiners_html: A discriminating question in which high scoring candidates had much greater success in explaining the Lewis acid-base nature of the chloride ion in the given reaction. The next two common incorrect answers were B and D showing a lack of understanding of the Lewis acid-base concept.
